sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hih leitungin gibang khenna gam hi,
Mitphiat kalsung nangawn lungmuan om thei lo,
Tu nuam taleng ding khawlnuam ta leng pai,
Hih leitung kikhen na gam hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ih khen zongin Zeisu sung kimu kik ding,
Lei ah ih kimu diam vankimlai ah,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ih khen zongin kimuding khawlmun ah,
Hih leitungin ih khualzinna gam bek hi,
Ih khawlkhawm zong holung cimom man lo,
Hih lei kitui luanna gam hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hun leh tuiluang in hongpai kheng kheng veh
Hih leitungin asawt ding hinawn lopi.
Kikhen om nawnlo ding van ah.
